blocks.text: Reitan and Ventura tee off as Norwegian golf eyes Houston glory

Thursday is a Norwegian golfer's day: Kristoffer Reitan and Kristoffer Ventura carry the flag at the Houston Open, a final Masters tune-up with ranking points on the line. Eyes on Augusta are already sharpening.
⛳ Reitan & Ventura tee it up at Texas Children's Houston Open — 05:00
